content: This is the final card of the English
Adept vocabulary extension pack. 1000
Words. You made it. Congratulations.
You started with express and ended up
with inauspicious. That's not just a
broader vocabulary — it's a different
relationship with English.
You can now read a newspaper editorial
and follow every turn. Hold your own
in any conversation. Write with the
kind of precision that makes people
listen more carefully.
The goal of Tier 5: Become spectacular.
It's certainly a spectacular achievement
to have gotten to the end. Well done!
As one door closses another one opens:
English Adept is the hub of an ever-
expanding English language ecosystem.
If you would like to continue your
FlashBoss Journey, there is more to
find at the Steam store page.
German Roots and Norman Roots reveal
the two sides of the English language.
Greek Roots and Latin Roots teach the
hidden architecture beneath.
But for right now, a heartfelt thank
you for studying with FlashBoss, and
Well done. You are an English Adept.
